# Section Before Blockquote

This is normal content before the blockquote.

> # This is NOT a heading (blockquote level 1)
> This is quoted text.
> ## This is also NOT a heading (blockquote level 1)

# Section After Blockquote

This is content after the blockquote.
The blockquote content should be part of the previous section.

## Subsection with Nested Blockquote

Here is a nested blockquote:

>> # This is NOT a heading (nested blockquote level 2)
>> ## Also NOT a heading (nested blockquote level 2)

>>> # This is NOT a heading (nested blockquote level 3)

Normal content in subsection.

# Section With Mixed Blockquote and Code

> ```
> # This looks like a heading in a code block inside a blockquote
> ```

```
# This is in a code block, not a blockquote
```

> Regular blockquote line without heading.

# Section After All

This is the final section to verify IDs remain sequential.
